title: astragalus aurantiacus
intro: Astragalus aurantiacus, also known as orange milk vetch, is a perennial legume native to China that belongs to the pea family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus aurantiacus include reducing fatigue and stress, boosting the immune system, and protecting against oxidative damage. Astragalus aurantiacus can be prepared into various herbal products, such as capsules, tablets, teas, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
